description: Operator harness preset: evaluation objective is pattern outcome quality (not raw PnL or win-rate targets).

notes.intent_plain: The agent should improve pattern recognition such that it captures more of winning moves and reduces the magnitude of losses through better entry and exit behavior.
notes.machine_eval: Optimize outcome quality metrics derived from pattern-aware behavior; do not target a fixed PnL or win rate.
notes.emphasis: Pattern recognition quality over raw profit; capturing more of moves and cutting losses early.
